content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
E02:30MOMx6 Sets, Build Up For The Following Complex:
Muscle Clean
Hang Power Clean
Hang Squat Clean
(1+3+2)

Metcon:
E04:00MOMX4 Rounds:
24\18 Cals Row
15 Toes To Bars
Max WallBall Shots #10/6kg For The Remaining.

CrossFit Endurance
35:00 Min EMOM x Max Reps Each:
1.) Alt. DB Snatch #1x17.5/12/5kg
2.) Box Jumps #60/50cm #10/6kg
3.) Rest
4.)WallBall Shots #10/6kg
5.)Knees To Elbows
